hypothesis: Imposing lattice-symmetry aware constraints on the CPD-S tensor completion model—by constraining the design-mode factors to transform according to the symmetry group of each lattice class (Gyroid, Schwarz, Diamond, Lidinoid)—will improve predictive accuracy and bias-robustness for unseen unit-cell geometries in biased sampling scenarios, compared to unconstrained CPD-S and NeAT.
